name: Dis-Chem Pharmacies Limited
summary: Dis-Chem Pharmacies Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the retail and wholesale of healthcare products and pharmaceuticals in South Africa. It operates a chain of retail stores that offers a range of products, including dispensary, personal care and beauty, healthcare and nutrition, baby care, and other products, such as confectionary, household goods, and ancillary services that include clinics, and hair and beauty salons. The company also provides click and collect services and operates an online platform. Further, it is involved in the wholesale of pharmaceutical, health, and front shop products; and provision of customer loyalty programs. The company was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Midrand, South Africa. Dis-Chem Pharmacies Limited is a subsidiary of Ivlyn No4 Proprietary Limited.
